tEn: JanusFlow: Harmonizing Autoregression and Rectified Flow for Unified Multimodal Understanding and Generation
tZh: JanusFlow：融合自回归与整流流实现统一多模态理解与生成
sEn: JanusFlow unifies image understanding and generation in a single model by integrating autoregressive language models with rectified flow, achieving superior performance without complex architectural modifications.
sZh: JanusFlow通过将自回归语言模型与整流流集成，在单一模型中统一了图像理解与生成，无需复杂架构修改即可实现卓越性能。
absEn: We present JanusFlow, a powerful framework that unifies image understanding and generation in a single model. JanusFlow introduces a minimalist architecture that integrates autoregressive language models with rectified flow, a state-of-the-art method in generative modeling. Our key finding demonstrates that rectified flow can be straightforwardly trained within the large language model framework, eliminating the need for complex architectural modifications. To further improve the performance of our unified model, we adopt two key strategies: (i) decoupling the understanding and generation encoders, and (ii) aligning their representations during unified training. Extensive experiments show that JanusFlow achieves comparable or superior performance to specialized models in their respective domains, while significantly outperforming existing unified approaches across standard benchmarks. This work represents a step toward more efficient and versatile vision-language models.
absZh: 我们提出了JanusFlow，一个强大的框架，在单一模型中统一了图像理解与生成。JanusFlow引入了一种极简架构，将自回归语言模型与整流流（一种生成建模中的先进方法）相结合。我们的关键发现表明，整流流可以在大语言模型框架内直接训练，无需复杂的架构修改。为了进一步提升统一模型的性能，我们采用了两个关键策略：（i）解耦理解与生成编码器，（ii）在统一训练中对齐它们的表示。大量实验表明，JanusFlow在各自领域达到了与专用模型相当或更优的性能，同时在标准基准测试中显著优于现有的统一方法。这项工作朝着更高效、更通用的视觉语言模型迈出了一步。

contrib.en: Introduces JanusFlow, a unified framework integrating autoregressive LLMs with rectified flow for image understanding and generation.
contrib.zh: 提出JanusFlow，一个统一框架，将自回归大语言模型与整流流结合，用于图像理解与生成。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that rectified flow can be trained within LLM architecture without complex modifications.
contrib.zh: 证明整流流可在LLM架构内直接训练，无需复杂修改。

contrib.en: Proposes decoupled vision encoders for understanding and generation to prevent task interference.
contrib.zh: 提出解耦的视觉编码器用于理解和生成，防止任务干扰。

contrib.en: Introduces representation alignment regularization to improve generation quality.
contrib.zh: 引入表征对齐正则化以提升生成质量。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multimodal understanding and text-to-image generation benchmarks with a 1.3B model.
contrib.zh: 在1.3B参数模型上，在多模态理解和文生图基准上达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Outperforms existing unified approaches and several specialized models across standard benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在标准基准上超越现有统一方法和多个专用模型。

limits.en: Model size limited to 1.3B parameters; scalability to larger models not explored.
limits.zh: 模型规模限于1.3B参数，未探索向更大模型扩展。

limits.en: Requires three-stage training with careful data ratio tuning.
limits.zh: 需要三阶段训练，并仔细调整数据比例。

limits.en: Image resolution fixed at 384x384; higher resolutions may require adaptation.
limits.zh: 图像分辨率固定为384x384，更高分辨率可能需要调整。

limits.en: Relies on pre-trained VAE and SigLIP encoders; performance may depend on their quality.
limits.zh: 依赖预训练的VAE和SigLIP编码器，性能可能受其质量影响。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to English-language benchmarks; multilingual capabilities not assessed.
limits.zh: 评估限于英文基准，未评估多语言能力。

items.en: We present JanusFlow, a powerful framework that unifies image understanding and generation in a single model. JanusFlow introduces a minimalist architecture that integrates autoregressive language models with rectified flow, a state-of-the-art method in generative modeling. Our key finding demonstrates that rectified flow can be straightforwardly trained within the large language model framework, eliminating the need for complex architectural modifications. To further improve the performance of our unified model, we adopt two key strategies: (i) decoupling the understanding and generation encoders, and (ii) aligning their representations during unified training. Extensive experiments show that JanusFlow achieves comparable or superior performance to specialized models in their respective domains, while significantly outperforming existing unified approaches across standard benchmarks. This work represents a step toward more efficient and versatile vision-language models.
items.zh: 我们提出JanusFlow，一个强大的框架，将图像理解与生成统一于单一模型中。JanusFlow引入极简架构，将自回归语言模型与整流流（一种生成建模的前沿方法）相结合。我们的关键发现表明，整流流可以直接在大语言模型框架内进行训练，无需复杂的架构修改。为了进一步提升统一模型的性能，我们采用两项关键策略：(i) 解耦理解与生成编码器，(ii) 在统一训练中对齐它们的表示。大量实验表明，JanusFlow在各自领域达到与专用模型相当或更优的性能，同时在标准基准上显著优于现有统一方法。这项工作朝着更高效、更通用的视觉语言模型迈出了一步。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in learning diverse knowledge and generalizing to new scenarios [88, 68, 1, 8, 7]. Leveraging these capabilities, researchers have developed sophisticated models specialized in image comprehension [57, 56, 47, 2, 15, 49] and text-to-image generation [77, 74, 71, 23].
items.zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在学习多样知识和泛化到新场景方面展现出卓越能力[88, 68, 1, 8, 7]。利用这些能力，研究者开发了专门用于图像理解[57, 56, 47, 2, 15, 49]和文生图[77, 74, 71, 23]的复杂模型。

items.en: The field has recently shifted toward creating unified systems capable of handling both tasks simultaneously. One prominent direction involves utilizing pre-trained text-to-image models for high-quality generation while training LLMs to generate conditions for these models [25, 26, 84, 27, 19]. However, this approach introduces architectural complexity and potentially constrains the model’s capabilities through maintaining separate LLM and generative components. Alternative approaches [85, 95, 96, 103, 93] propose training a single LLM for both tasks, typically incorporating either diffusion models [32, 80] or vector-quantized autoregressive models [22, 83].
items.zh: 该领域近期转向创建能同时处理这两类任务的统一系统。一个主要方向是利用预训练的文本到图像模型进行高质量生成，同时训练LLM为这些模型生成条件[25, 26, 84, 27, 19]。然而，这种方法引入了架构复杂性，并通过保持独立的LLM和生成组件可能限制模型能力。替代方法[85, 95, 96, 103, 93]提出训练单一LLM同时处理两项任务，通常结合扩散模型[32, 80]或向量量化自回归模型[22, 83]。

items.en: Our approach builds upon recent breakthroughs in rectified flow models [60, 55, 3, 23, 61], which provide a simple framework for generative modeling while delivering exceptional empirical performance [23, 45, 36]. Building on these advances, we propose JanusFlow, a powerful unified multimodal model that seamlessly integrates rectified flow with LLM architecture. Following a minimalist design principle, our architecture requires only a lightweight encoder and decoder to adapt the LLM for rectified flow operations. To optimize JanusFlow’s performance, we implement two key strategies: First, we maintain separate vision encoders for understanding and generation tasks, preventing task interference and thus enhancing comprehension capabilities. Second, we align the intermediate representations between generation and understanding modules during training, strengthening semantic coherence in the generation process.
items.zh: 我们的方法建立在整流流模型[60, 55, 3, 23, 61]的最新突破之上，这些模型为生成建模提供了简单框架，同时具有出色的实证性能[23, 45, 36]。基于这些进展，我们提出JanusFlow，一个强大的统一多模态模型，将整流流与LLM架构无缝集成。遵循极简设计原则，我们的架构仅需轻量级编码器和解码器即可使LLM适应整流流操作。为优化JanusFlow的性能，我们实施两项关键策略：首先，我们为理解和生成任务保持独立的视觉编码器，防止任务干扰从而增强理解能力。其次，我们在训练中对齐生成和理解模块之间的中间表示，增强生成过程中的语义连贯性。

items.en: JanusFlow shows state-of-the-art performances in both multimodal comprehension and text-to-image generation compared to existing unified approaches, and even outperforms several specialized methods. Specifically, on text-to-image generation benchmarks, MJHQ FID-303030k [48], GenEval [28] and DPG-Bench [34], JanusFlow achieves scores of 9.519.519.51, 0.630.630.63 and 80.09%percent80.0980.09\%, surpassing established text-to-image models including SDv1.5 [75] and SDXL [71]. In multimodal comprehension benchmarks, JanusFlow attains scores of 74.974.974.9, 70.570.570.5 and 60.360.360.3 on MMBench [62], SeedBench [46], and GQA [35], respectively, exceeding specialized models such as LLaVA-v1.5 [56] and Qwen-VL-Chat [4]. Notably, these results are achieved with a compact LLM architecture with only 1.3B parameters.
items.zh: JanusFlow在多模态理解和文本到图像生成方面均展现出与现有统一方法相比的最先进性能，甚至超过了几种专用方法。具体而言，在文本到图像生成基准MJHQ FID-30k [48]、GenEval [28]和DPG-Bench [34]上，JanusFlow分别达到9.51、0.63和80.09%的分数，超过了包括SDv1.5 [75]和SDXL [71]在内的成熟文本到图像模型。在多模态理解基准上，JanusFlow在MMBench [62]、SeedBench [46]和GQA [35]上分别获得74.9、70.5和60.3分，超过了LLaVA-v1.5 [56]和Qwen-VL-Chat [4]等专用模型。值得注意的是，这些结果是通过仅1.3B参数的紧凑LLM架构实现的。

items.en: Recent years have witnessed remarkable progress in visual generation through diffusion models [32, 80], leading to impressive models like [75, 71, 76, 77, 74, 66]. Building on these advances, flow-based generative models [60, 55, 3] emerged as a simplified alternative framework. These approaches have recently enabled advanced visual generation models [23, 36] that achieve superior empirical performance with faster sampling. Our work demonstrates that rectified flow [60, 59, 61] can be effectively integrated into LLMs, creating unified models that excel in both understanding and generation tasks.
items.zh: 近年来，通过扩散模型[32, 80]，视觉生成取得了显著进展，产生了如[75, 71, 76, 77, 74, 66]等令人印象深刻的模型。基于这些进展，基于流的生成模型[60, 55, 3]作为一种简化的替代框架出现。这些方法近期实现了先进的视觉生成模型[23, 36]，以更快的采样速度获得了优越的实证性能。我们的工作表明，整流流[60, 59, 61]可以有效地集成到LLM中，创建在理解和生成任务中都表现出色的统一模型。

items.en: The development of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has enabled effective integration of text and visual information. Building upon powerful LLMs [88, 89, 7], recent MLLMs [63, 57, 56, 2, 15, 49] have demonstrated exceptional multimodal understanding capabilities. Current research increasingly focuses on architectures that can simultaneously handle visual understanding and generation tasks. One approach extends MLLMs with pre-trained diffusion models [25, 26, 84, 27, 19, 97]. However, these systems essentially utilize diffusion models as external tools, where the MLLM generates conditions for image generation without possessing direct generative capabilities. This separation often results in suboptimal performance compared to standalone diffusion models [25, 84]. Another line of work [85, 95, 96, 103, 93] aim to train a single LLM for both tasks. Many of these methods employ vector-quantization [22, 83] to convert images into discrete tokens, enabling unified autoregressive processing [85, 93]. While straightforward to implement, these approaches are inherently limited by their image tokenization quality.
items.zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的发展实现了文本与视觉信息的有效整合。基于强大的LLM [88, 89, 7]，最近的MLLM [63, 57, 56, 2, 15, 49]展示了卓越的多模态理解能力。当前研究越来越关注能够同时处理视觉理解和生成任务的架构。一种方法用预训练的扩散模型扩展MLLM [25, 26, 84, 27, 19, 97]。然而，这些系统本质上将扩散模型用作外部工具，MLLM生成图像生成的条件而不具备直接生成能力。这种分离通常导致性能不如独立的扩散模型[25, 84]。另一条工作线[85, 95, 96, 103, 93]旨在训练单一LLM同时处理两项任务。其中许多方法采用向量量化[22, 83]将图像转换为离散标记，实现统一的自回归处理[85, 93]。虽然实现简单，但这些方法本质上受限于其图像标记化质量。

items.en: Our work focuses on developing unified models that combine autoregressive capabilities with flow/diffusion models, leveraging their proven effectiveness in visual generation. Compared to similar approaches [96, 103], JanusFlow offers three key advantages: (i) a simple yet effective generation process using rectified flow, (ii) enhanced performance through decoupled vision encoders that resolve inter-task conflicts, and (iii) improved generation quality through representation alignment regularization, enabled by our decoupled encoder design.
items.zh: 我们的工作专注于开发结合自回归能力与流/扩散模型的统一模型，利用它们在视觉生成中已证明的有效性。与类似方法[96, 103]相比，JanusFlow提供三个关键优势：(i) 使用整流流的简单而有效的生成过程，(ii) 通过解耦视觉编码器解决任务间冲突从而增强性能，(iii) 通过表示对齐正则化（得益于解耦编码器设计）提高生成质量。

items.en: In this section, we introduce the architecture of JanusFlow and our training strategies.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍JanusFlow的架构和训练策略。

items.en: where θL​L​Msubscript𝜃𝐿𝐿𝑀\theta_{LLM} denotes the parameters of the LLM and ℓℓ\ell is the sequence length. After being trained on large-scale datasets, LLMs exhibit the ability to generalize across various tasks and follow diverse instructions [8, 1, 68]. To extend these models to handle visual inputs, LLMs are augmented with vision encoders [57, 56, 2]. For instance, LLaVA [57] integrates an LLM with a pre-trained CLIP [73] image encoder via a projection layer, transforming the extracted image features into a joint embedding space that the LLM can process as word embeddings. By leveraging large-scale multimodal datasets and increasingly powerful LLMs, this architecture has facilitated the development of advanced multimodal models capable of addressing a wide range of vision-language tasks [4, 56, 47, 63].
items.zh: 其中θ_LLM表示LLM的参数，ℓ是序列长度。在大规模数据集上训练后，LLM展现出跨各种任务泛化和遵循多样指令的能力[8, 1, 68]。为了将这些模型扩展到处理视觉输入，LLM通过视觉编码器增强[57, 56, 2]。例如，LLaVA [57]通过投影层将LLM与预训练的CLIP [73]图像编码器集成，将提取的图像特征转换为联合嵌入空间，LLM可将其作为词嵌入处理。通过利用大规模多模态数据集和日益强大的LLM，该架构促进了能够处理广泛视觉语言任务的高级多模态模型的发展[4, 56, 47, 63]。

full.sec: 3.2 A Unified Framework for Multimodal Understanding and Generation
full.secZh: 3.2 多模态理解与生成的统一框架

items.en: JanusFlow presents a unified framework designed to address both vision understanding and image generation tasks. Next we outline how JanusFlow handles these two tasks within a single LLM architecture.
items.zh: JanusFlow提供了一个统一框架，旨在处理视觉理解和图像生成任务。接下来我们概述JanusFlow如何在单一LLM架构中处理这两项任务。

items.en: In multimodal understanding tasks, the LLM processes an input sequence consisting of interleaved text and image data. The text is tokenized into discrete tokens, each of which is transformed into an embedding of dimension De​m​bsubscript𝐷𝑒𝑚𝑏D_{emb}. For the images, an image encoder fe​n​csubscript𝑓𝑒𝑛𝑐f_{enc} encodes each image xi​msubscript𝑥𝑖𝑚x_{im} into a feature map of shape Hi​m×Wi​m×De​n​csubscript𝐻𝑖𝑚subscript𝑊𝑖𝑚subscript𝐷𝑒𝑛𝑐H_{im}\times W_{im}\times D_{enc}. This feature map is flattened and projected through a linear transformation layer into a sequence of embeddings with shape Hi​m​Wi​m×De​m​bsubscript𝐻𝑖𝑚subscript𝑊𝑖𝑚subscript𝐷𝑒𝑚𝑏H_{im}W_{im}\times D_{emb}. Hi​msubscript𝐻𝑖𝑚H_{im} and Wi​msubscript𝑊𝑖𝑚W_{im} are determined by the image encoder. The text and image embeddings are concatenated to form the input sequence to the LLM, which then autoregressively predicts the next tokens based on the input sequence of embeddings. According to common practice [93, 85, 96], we add special token |BOI| before the image and |EOI| after the image to help the model locate the image embeddings in the sequence.
items.zh: 在多模态理解任务中，LLM处理由交错文本和图像数据组成的输入序列。文本被分词为离散标记，每个标记转换为维度D_emb的嵌入。对于图像，图像编码器f_enc将每个图像x_im编码为形状为H_im×W_im×D_enc的特征图。该特征图被展平并通过线性变换层投影为形状为H_im W_im×D_emb的嵌入序列。H_im和W_im由图像编码器决定。文本和图像嵌入被拼接形成LLM的输入序列，然后LLM基于输入嵌入序列自回归地预测下一个标记。根据常见做法[93, 85, 96]，我们在图像前添加特殊标记|BOI|，在图像后添加|EOI|，以帮助模型定位序列中的图像嵌入。

items.en: For image generation, our LLM takes a text sequence xc​o​nsuperscript𝑥𝑐𝑜𝑛x^{con} as condition and generates a corresponding image using rectified flow. To improve computational efficiency, generation occurs in the latent space using a pre-trained SDXL-VAE [71].
items.zh: 对于图像生成，我们的LLM以文本序列x^{con}为条件，使用整流流生成对应图像。为提高计算效率，生成在潜在空间中使用预训练的SDXL-VAE [71]进行。

items.en: Previous approaches that unify autoregressive generation and diffusion models within a joint LLM training framework [103, 96] employ identical encoders (fe​n​csubscript𝑓𝑒𝑛𝑐f_{enc} and ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc}) for both understanding and generation tasks. For instance, Zhou et al. [103] performs both tasks in the same VAE latent space using a shared U-Net or linear encoder, while Xie et al. [96] leverages MAGVIT-v2 [98] to encode image patches into discrete tokens for both tasks.
items.zh: 先前在联合 LLM 训练框架内统一自回归生成和扩散模型的方法 [103, 96] 对理解和生成任务采用相同的编码器（f_enc 和 g_enc）。例如，Zhou 等人 [103] 使用共享的 U-Net 或线性编码器在同一 VAE 潜空间中执行两项任务，而 Xie 等人 [96] 利用 MAGVIT-v2 [98] 将图像块编码为离散标记用于两项任务。

items.en: However, recent work on unified autoregressive models has shown this shared encoder design to be suboptimal [93], particularly in models that generate images through autoregression on vector-quantized tokens. Drawing from these insights, JanusFlow adopts a decoupled encoder design. Specifically, we employ a pre-trained SigLIP-Large-Patch/16 [102] model as fe​n​csubscript𝑓𝑒𝑛𝑐f_{enc} to extract semantic continuous features for multimodal understanding, while using separate ConvNeXt blocks [92] initialized from scratch as ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc} and gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec} for generation, chosen for its effectiveness. Following established practices [5, 14, 90], we incorporate a long skip connection between ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc} and gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec}. Our controlled experiments in Sec. 4.5 demonstrate that this decoupled encoder design significantly improves the performance of our unified model. The complete architecture of JanusFlow is illustrated in Fig. 2.
items.zh: 然而，近期关于统一自回归模型的研究表明，这种共享编码器设计并非最优 [93]，尤其是在通过向量量化标记自回归生成图像的模型中。基于这些见解，JanusFlow 采用解耦编码器设计。具体而言，我们使用预训练的 SigLIP-Large-Patch/16 [102] 模型作为 f_enc 来提取语义连续特征用于多模态理解，同时使用从零初始化的独立 ConvNeXt 块 [92] 作为 g_enc 和 g_dec 用于生成，因其有效性而被选中。遵循既定实践 [5, 14, 90]，我们在 g_enc 和 g_dec 之间加入长跳跃连接。我们在第 4.5 节中的控制实验表明，这种解耦编码器设计显著提升了我们统一模型的性能。JanusFlow 的完整架构如图 2 所示。

items.en: As illustrated in Fig. 3, we train our model in three sequential stages, detailed below.
items.zh: 如图 3 所示，我们分三个连续阶段训练模型，详情如下。

items.en: In the first stage, we focus on training only the randomly initialized components: the linear layers, generation encoder, and generation decoder. This stage serves to adapt these new modules to work effectively with the pre-trained LLM and SigLIP encoder, essentially functioning as an initialization phase for the newly introduced components.
items.zh: 在第一阶段，我们仅训练随机初始化的组件：线性层、生成编码器和生成解码器。此阶段旨在使这些新模块与预训练的 LLM 和 SigLIP 编码器有效配合，本质上作为新引入组件的初始化阶段。

items.en: Following the adaptation stage, we train the entire model except for the visual encoder, consistent with previous approaches [57, 63]. The training incorporates three data types: multimodal understanding, image generation, and text-only data. We initially allocate a higher proportion of multimodal understanding data to establish the model’s understanding capabilities. Subsequently, we increase the ratio of image generation data to accommodate the convergence requirements of diffusion-based models [18, 70].
items.zh: 在适应阶段之后，我们训练除视觉编码器外的整个模型，这与先前方法 [57, 63] 一致。训练包含三种数据类型：多模态理解、图像生成和纯文本数据。我们最初分配较高比例的多模态理解数据以建立模型的理解能力。随后，我们增加图像生成数据的比例以适应基于扩散模型的收敛要求 [18, 70]。

items.en: In the final stage, we fine-tune the pre-trained model using instruction tuning data, which comprises dialogues, task-specific conversations, and high-quality text-conditioned image generation examples. During this stage, we also unfreeze the SigLIP encoder parameters [63, 87, 93]. This fine-tuning process enables the model to effectively respond to user instructions for both multimodal understanding and image generation tasks.
items.zh: 在最后阶段，我们使用指令微调数据对预训练模型进行微调，这些数据包括对话、任务特定对话和高质量文本条件图像生成示例。在此阶段，我们还解冻 SigLIP 编码器参数 [63, 87, 93]。此微调过程使模型能够有效响应用户对多模态理解和图像生成任务的指令。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Three training stages of JanusFlow. The trainable modules are marked with flame and the frozen modules are marked with snowflakes.
items.capZh: 图 3：JanusFlow 的三个训练阶段。可训练模块用火焰标记，冻结模块用雪花标记。

items.en: Training JanusFlow involves two types of data, multimodal understanding data and image generation data. Both types of data contain two parts: “condition” and “response”. “Condition” refers to the prompting of the tasks (e.g., text prompts in the task of generation and images in the task of understanding) while “response” refers to the corresponding responses of the two tasks. The data can be formatted as x=(xc​o​n,xr​e​s)𝑥superscript𝑥𝑐𝑜𝑛superscript𝑥𝑟𝑒𝑠x=(x^{con},x^{res}), where the superscript c​o​n𝑐𝑜𝑛con denotes “condition” and r​e​s𝑟𝑒𝑠res denotes “response”. We denote the length of the whole sequence x𝑥x as ℓℓ\ell, the length of xc​o​nsuperscript𝑥𝑐𝑜𝑛x^{con} as ℓc​o​nsubscriptℓ𝑐𝑜𝑛\ell_{con} and the length of xr​e​ssuperscript𝑥𝑟𝑒𝑠x^{res} as ℓr​e​ssubscriptℓ𝑟𝑒𝑠\ell_{res}. We use θ𝜃\theta to represent the collection of all the trainable parameters in JanusFlow, including the LLM, fe​n​csubscript𝑓𝑒𝑛𝑐f_{enc}, ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc}, gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec} and the linear transformation layers.
items.zh: 训练 JanusFlow 涉及两种数据类型：多模态理解数据和图像生成数据。两种数据都包含两部分：“条件”和“响应”。“条件”指任务的提示（例如，生成任务中的文本提示和理解任务中的图像），而“响应”指两项任务的对应响应。数据可格式化为 x = (x^con, x^res)，其中上标 con 表示“条件”，res 表示“响应”。我们将整个序列 x 的长度记为 ℓ，x^con 的长度记为 ℓ_con，x^res 的长度记为 ℓ_res。我们用 θ 表示 JanusFlow 中所有可训练参数的集合，包括 LLM、f_enc、g_enc、g_dec 和线性变换层。

items.en: Recent work [99] has shown that aligning intermediate representations between diffusion transformers and semantic vision encoders enhances diffusion model generalization. Our decoupled vision encoder design enables efficient implementation of this alignment as a regularization term. Specifically, for generation tasks, we align features from the understanding encoder fe​n​csubscript𝑓𝑒𝑛𝑐f_{enc} with the LLM’s intermediate features,
items.zh: 近期工作 [99] 表明，对齐扩散 Transformer 与语义视觉编码器之间的中间表示可增强扩散模型泛化能力。我们的解耦视觉编码器设计能够高效地将这种对齐作为正则化项实现。具体而言，对于生成任务，我们将理解编码器 f_enc 的特征与 LLM 的中间特征对齐，

items.en: where qθ​(zt)subscript𝑞𝜃subscript𝑧𝑡q_{\theta}(z_{t}) denotes an intermediate LLM representation given input ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}, and hφsubscriptℎ𝜑h_{\varphi} is a small trainable MLP that projects qθ​(zt)subscript𝑞𝜃subscript𝑧𝑡q_{\theta}(z_{t}) to dimension De​n​csubscript𝐷𝑒𝑛𝑐D_{enc}. The function sim​(⋅,⋅)sim⋅⋅\text{sim}(\cdot,\cdot) computes the mean of element-wise cosine similarity between embeddings. Before computing the loss, we reshape hφ​(qθ​(zt))subscriptℎ𝜑subscript𝑞𝜃subscript𝑧𝑡h_{\varphi}(q_{\theta}(z_{t})) to Hg​e​n×Wg​e​n×De​n​csubscript𝐻𝑔𝑒𝑛subscript𝑊𝑔𝑒𝑛subscript𝐷𝑒𝑛𝑐H_{gen}\times W_{gen}\times D_{enc}. To simplify the implementation, we intentionally adjust the configuration of ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc} and gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec} to ensure Hg​e​n=Hi​msubscript𝐻𝑔𝑒𝑛subscript𝐻𝑖𝑚H_{gen}=H_{im} and Wg​e​n=Wi​msubscript𝑊𝑔𝑒𝑛subscript𝑊𝑖𝑚W_{gen}=W_{im}. The gradient of ℒR​E​P​Asubscriptℒ𝑅𝐸𝑃𝐴\mathcal{L}_{REPA} is not back-propagated through the understanding encoder. This alignment loss helps the LLM’s internal feature space (given noisy input ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}) align with the understanding encoder’s semantic feature space, thereby improving generation quality when producing images from new random noise and text conditions during inference.
items.zh: 其中 q_θ(z_t) 表示给定输入 z_t 的 LLM 中间表示，h_φ 是一个小型可训练 MLP，将 q_θ(z_t) 投影到维度 D_enc。函数 sim(·,·) 计算嵌入之间逐元素余弦相似度的均值。在计算损失之前，我们将 h_φ(q_θ(z_t)) 重塑为 H_gen × W_gen × D_enc。为简化实现，我们有意调整 g_enc 和 g_dec 的配置，确保 H_gen = H_im 且 W_gen = W_im。L_REPA 的梯度不反向传播通过理解编码器。这种对齐损失有助于 LLM 的内部特征空间（给定含噪输入 z_t）与理解编码器的语义特征空间对齐，从而在推理时从新的随机噪声和文本条件生成图像时提高生成质量。

items.en: All three objectives are applied across all training stages. Multimodal understanding tasks use ℒA​Rsubscriptℒ𝐴𝑅\mathcal{L}_{AR}, while image generation tasks employ the combined loss ℒR​F+ℒR​E​P​Asubscriptℒ𝑅𝐹subscriptℒ𝑅𝐸𝑃𝐴\mathcal{L}_{RF}+\mathcal{L}_{REPA}. Detailed experimental settings are provided in Sec. 4.1.
items.zh: 所有三个目标均应用于所有训练阶段。多模态理解任务使用 L_AR，而图像生成任务使用组合损失 L_RF + L_REPA。详细实验设置见第 4.1 节。

items.en: We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the capabilities of JanusFlow in both multimodal understanding and generation tasks. First, we describe our experimental setup and implementation details. Then, we present results on standard benchmarks for multimodal understanding and image generation. Finally, we perform ablation studies to validate our key design choices.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验来评估 JanusFlow 在多模态理解和生成任务中的能力。首先，我们描述实验设置和实现细节。然后，我们展示在多模态理解和图像生成标准基准上的结果。最后，我们进行消融研究以验证我们的关键设计选择。

items.en: Our framework builds upon an enhanced version111This version, trained on an expanded text corpus compared to the one in Janus [93], has been demonstrated to possess better performance on multiple-choice benchmarks (e.g., MMBench [62] and SEED Bench [46]). Our preliminary experiments suggest that it has minimal impact on the quality of visual generation. of DeepSeek-LLM (1.3B) [7, 63]. The LLM consists of 24 transformer blocks and supports a sequence length of 4,09640964,096. In our model, both understanding and generation exploits images of resolution 384.
items.zh: 我们的框架基于 DeepSeek-LLM (1.3B) [7, 63] 的增强版本¹¹¹该版本在比 Janus [93] 更大的文本语料上训练，已被证明在多项选择基准（如 MMBench [62] 和 SEED Bench [46]）上具有更好性能。我们的初步实验表明，它对视觉生成质量影响极小。。LLM 包含 24 个 Transformer 块，支持 4,096 的序列长度。在我们的模型中，理解和生成均使用分辨率为 384 的图像。

items.en: For multimodal understanding, we leverage SigLIP-Large-Patch/16 [102] as fe​n​csubscript𝑓𝑒𝑛𝑐f_{enc}. For image generation, we utilize the pre-trained SDXL-VAE [71] for its latent space. The generation encoder ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc} comprises a 2×2222\times 2 patchify layer followed by two ConvNeXt [92] blocks and a linear layer. The generation decoder gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec} combines two ConvNeXt blocks, a pixel-shuffle layer to upsample the feature map, and a linear layer. Our SigLIP encoder contains ∼300similar-toabsent300\sim 300M parameters. ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc} and gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec} are light-weight modules, containing ∼70similar-toabsent70\sim 70M parameters in total. Table 1 details the hyperparameters for each training stage. In the alignment regularization, we use the LLM features after the 6th block as qθ​(zt)subscript𝑞𝜃subscript𝑧𝑡q_{\theta}(z_{t}) and a three-layer MLP as hφsubscriptℎ𝜑h_{\varphi}. We employ an exponential moving average (EMA) with a ratio of 0.99 to ensure training stability.
items.zh: 对于多模态理解，我们采用 SigLIP-Large-Patch/16 [102] 作为 f_enc。对于图像生成，我们利用预训练的 SDXL-VAE [71] 的潜在空间。生成编码器 g_enc 包含一个 2×2 的 patchify 层，后接两个 ConvNeXt [92] 块和一个线性层。生成解码器 g_dec 结合了两个 ConvNeXt 块、一个用于上采样特征图的像素重组层和一个线性层。我们的 SigLIP 编码器包含约 3 亿个参数。g_enc 和 g_dec 是轻量级模块，总共包含约 7000 万个参数。表 1 详细列出了每个训练阶段的超参数。在对齐正则化中，我们使用第 6 个块之后的 LLM 特征作为 q_θ(z_t)，并使用三层 MLP 作为 h_φ。我们采用指数移动平均（EMA），比率为 0.99，以确保训练稳定性。

items.en: For data preprocessing, we deal with understanding and generation data differently. For understanding tasks, we maintain all image information by resizing the long side to the target size and padding the image to squares. For generation tasks, we resize the short side to the target size and apply random square cropping to avoid padding artifacts. During training, multiple sequences are packed to form a single sequence of length 4,09640964,096 for training efficiency. Our implementation is based on the HAI-LLM platform [31] using PyTorch [72]. Training was conducted on NVIDIA A100 GPUs, with each model requiring ∼1,600similar-toabsent1600\sim 1,600 A100 GPU days.
items.zh: 对于数据预处理，我们分别处理理解和生成数据。对于理解任务，我们通过将长边调整到目标尺寸并将图像填充为正方形来保留所有图像信息。对于生成任务，我们将短边调整到目标尺寸并应用随机正方形裁剪以避免填充伪影。在训练期间，多个序列被打包成一个长度为 4,096 的单一序列以提高训练效率。我们的实现基于 HAI-LLM 平台 [31]，使用 PyTorch [72]。训练在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上进行，每个模型需要约 1,600 个 A100 GPU 天。

items.en: We follow Janus [93] to construct the training data. The data configuration for each training stage is listed below.
items.zh: 我们遵循 Janus [93] 构建训练数据。每个训练阶段的数据配置如下。

items.en: The first two stages of our framework uses three types of data: multimodal understanding data, image generation data and text-only data.
items.zh: 我们框架的前两个阶段使用三种类型的数据：多模态理解数据、图像生成数据和纯文本数据。

items.en: Multimodal Understanding Data. This type of data contains several sub-categories: (a) Image caption data. We incorporate caption datasets from [20, 41, 50, 51, 53, 79] and generate additional captions for images from [16, 43] using open-source multimodal understanding models. The data follows template formats, e.g., “<image>Generate the caption of this picture. <caption>”. (b) Charts and tables. We directly adopt the chart and table data from the training data of DeepSeek-VL [63]. (c) Task data. ShareGPT4V [11] data is utilized to facilitate basic question-answering capabilities during pre-training, structured as “<image><question><answer>”. (d) Interleaved text-image data. This sub-category is sourced from [81, 42].
items.zh: 多模态理解数据。此类数据包含几个子类别：(a) 图像描述数据。我们整合了来自 [20, 41, 50, 51, 53, 79] 的描述数据集，并使用开源多模态理解模型为来自 [16, 43] 的图像生成额外的描述。数据遵循模板格式，例如“<image>生成此图片的描述。<caption>”。(b) 图表和表格。我们直接采用 DeepSeek-VL [63] 训练数据中的图表和表格数据。(c) 任务数据。利用 ShareGPT4V [11] 数据在预训练期间促进基本的问答能力，结构为“<image><question><answer>”。(d) 交错文本-图像数据。此子类别来自 [81, 42]。

items.en: Image Generation Data. Our image generation dataset combines high-quality images from [16, 41, 43, 67, 69, 82, 21, 79] and 222 million in-house data. We enhance them with machine-generated captions using multimodal understanding models. We filter the images in [16, 79] with aspect ratios and aesthetic scores, retaining approximately 20%percent2020\% of the original datasets. 25%percent2525\% of the data contains single-sentence captions. These kind of data assist the model to be able to process short prompts. All the data points are formatted as “<prompt><image>”.
items.zh: 图像生成数据。我们的图像生成数据集结合了来自 [16, 41, 43, 67, 69, 82, 21, 79] 的高质量图像和 2 亿内部数据。我们使用多模态理解模型通过机器生成的描述来增强它们。我们根据宽高比和美学分数过滤 [16, 79] 中的图像，保留原始数据集的约 20%。25% 的数据包含单句描述。这类数据帮助模型能够处理短提示。所有数据点格式化为“<prompt><image>”。

items.en: Text-Only Data. We directly use the text corpus of DeepSeek-LLM [7].
items.zh: 纯文本数据。我们直接使用 DeepSeek-LLM [7] 的文本语料库。

items.en: Data for Stage 3. The SFT stage also uses three types of data:
items.zh: 阶段 3 的数据。SFT 阶段也使用三种类型的数据：

items.en: Multimodal Instruction Data. We leverage the instruction tuning datasets from [29, 33, 35, 47, 64, 78].
items.zh: 多模态指令数据。我们利用来自 [29, 33, 35, 47, 64, 78] 的指令微调数据集。

items.en: Image Generation Data. We reformat the high-quality text-image pairs from [16, 82, 79] into an instruction format: “User:<user prompt>\n\n Assistant:<image>”.
items.zh: 图像生成数据。我们将来自 [16, 82, 79] 的高质量文本-图像对重新格式化为指令格式：“User:<user prompt>\n\n Assistant:<image>”。

items.en: Text-Only Data. We directly incorporate the text-only data from [47].
items.zh: 纯文本数据。我们直接整合来自 [47] 的纯文本数据。

items.en: We evaluate the generated images using both visual quality and semantic accuracy metrics. For visual quality assessment, we employ the Fréchet Inception Distance [30] (FID) metric and compute FID between 30,000 generated images and their corresponding reference images from the MJHQ dataset [48]. The FID computation follows the implementation from GigaGAN [39]. To evaluate semantic accuracy, we utilize two specialized frameworks: GenEval [28] and DPG-Bench [34]. These frameworks are designed to assess whether the generated images accurately contain the objects and relationships specified in the input prompts, providing a broad evaluation of the generation capabilities.
items.zh: 我们使用视觉质量和语义准确性指标评估生成的图像。对于视觉质量评估，我们采用 Fréchet Inception Distance [30]（FID）指标，并计算 30,000 张生成图像与来自 MJHQ 数据集 [48] 的对应参考图像之间的 FID。FID 计算遵循 GigaGAN [39] 的实现。为了评估语义准确性，我们利用两个专门的框架：GenEval [28] 和 DPG-Bench [34]。这些框架旨在评估生成的图像是否准确包含输入提示中指定的对象和关系，从而对生成能力进行广泛评估。

items.en: We evaluate JanusFlow’s multimodal understanding abilities across a diverse set of vision-language benchmarks for general understanding capabilities, including POPE [52], MME [24], MMBench [62], SEEDBench [46], VQAv2 [29], GQA [35], MM-Vet [100], and MMMU [101].
items.zh: 我们在多种视觉语言基准上评估 JanusFlow 的多模态理解能力，包括 POPE [52]、MME [24]、MMBench [62]、SEEDBench [46]、VQAv2 [29]、GQA [35]、MM-Vet [100] 和 MMMU [101]。

items.en: Image Generation Performances. We report the performances on GenEval, DPG-Bench and MJHQ FID-30k. In Tab. 2, we give comparisons on GenEval including the scores of all the sub-tasks and the overall score. JanusFlow achieves an overall score of 0.63, surpassing the previous unified framework and several generation specific models including SDXL [71] and DALL-E 2 [74]. In Tab. 3, We show results on DPG-Bench and the corresponding comparisons. It is noted that all the methods in Tab. 3 are generation-specific models except our model. The results on GenEval and DPG-Bench demonstrate the ability of instruction following of our model. We give the comparisons on MJHQ FID-30k in Tab. 4. The images which are sampled to calculate FID are generated with a CFG factor w=2𝑤2w=2 and a number of sampling steps 303030. We sweep the CFG factor and the sampling steps and provide the results in the appendix. Our method achieves the best performance among all the models with 1.3B LLM. The results prove that the rectified flow is able to improve the quality of generated images over autoregressive models such as Janus [93].
items.zh: 图像生成性能。我们报告了在 GenEval、DPG-Bench 和 MJHQ FID-30k 上的性能。在表 2 中，我们给出了 GenEval 上的比较，包括所有子任务的得分和总体得分。JanusFlow 的总体得分为 0.63，超过了之前的统一框架和多个生成专用模型，包括 SDXL [71] 和 DALL-E 2 [74]。在表 3 中，我们展示了 DPG-Bench 上的结果及相应比较。值得注意的是，表 3 中的所有方法除我们的模型外都是生成专用模型。GenEval 和 DPG-Bench 上的结果证明了我们模型遵循指令的能力。我们在表 4 中给出了 MJHQ FID-30k 上的比较。用于计算 FID 的采样图像以 CFG 因子 w=2 和采样步数 30 生成。我们扫描了 CFG 因子和采样步数，并在附录中提供了结果。我们的方法在所有具有 1.3B LLM 的模型中取得了最佳性能。结果证明，修正流能够提高生成图像的质量，优于自回归模型如 Janus [93]。

items.en: Multimodal Understanding Performances. We show comparisons of our method and other methods including understanding-specific models and unified understanding and generation models in Tab. 5. Our model reaches the best performances among all the models with similar number of parameters and even surpasses multiple understanding-specific methods with larger scales. Our results demonstrate that our method harmonizes autoregressive LLM and rectified flow, achieving satisfying performance in both understanding and generation.
items.zh: 多模态理解性能。我们在表 5 中展示了我们的方法与其他方法（包括理解专用模型和统一理解与生成模型）的比较。我们的模型在参数数量相似的模型中达到了最佳性能，甚至超过了多个规模更大的理解专用方法。我们的结果表明，我们的方法协调了自回归 LLM 和修正流，在理解和生成方面都取得了令人满意的性能。

items.en: We conduct comprehensive ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of our key design choices. For computational efficiency, all ablation experiments are performed on 256×256256256256\times 256 resolution images222The understanding encoders in the 256×256256256256\times 256-based ablation studies is also SigLIP-Large-Patch/16 which is pre-trained on 256×256256256256\times 256 images.. All models are trained on our unified pre-training dataset for 50,0005000050,000 iterations, except for the understanding-only and generation-only variants, which are trained for proportionally fewer iterations based on their respective data ratios in the pre-training phase. The quantitative results of these ablation studies are presented in Tab. 6.
items.zh: 我们进行了全面的消融研究，以验证我们关键设计选择的有效性。为了计算效率，所有消融实验均在 256×256 分辨率图像上进行²。所有模型在我们的统一预训练数据集上训练了 50,000 次迭代，但仅理解和仅生成变体除外，它们根据预训练阶段各自的数据比例按比例训练了更少的迭代次数。这些消融研究的定量结果见表 6。

items.en: Impact of Representation Alignment. The comparison between Exp. A and F demonstrates the significant benefits of incorporating representation alignment regularization [99] during training. Specifically, models trained with representation alignment show notably lower FID scores on MJHQ dataset and higher CLIP scores, indicating simultaneous improvements in both image quality and semantic alignment. Importantly, our architecture differs from previous studies [70, 65] examined in [99] due to our incorporation of LLM and an additional skip connection between ge​n​csubscript𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑐g_{enc} and gd​e​csubscript𝑔𝑑𝑒𝑐g_{dec}. The effectiveness of representation alignment in our modified architecture suggests its broad applicability and generalization capability across different network structures.
items.zh: 表示对齐的影响。实验 A 和 F 的比较表明，在训练过程中加入表示对齐正则化 [99] 具有显著益处。具体来说，使用表示对齐训练的模型在 MJHQ 数据集上显示出明显更低的 FID 分数和更高的 CLIP 分数，表明图像质量和语义对齐同时得到改善。重要的是，我们的架构与 [99] 中研究的先前研究 [70, 65] 不同，因为我们引入了 LLM 以及 g_enc 和 g_dec 之间的额外跳跃连接。表示对齐在我们修改后的架构中的有效性表明其在不同网络结构中的广泛适用性和泛化能力。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Image generation results of JanusFlow. Our model can generate high-quality images that are semantically consistent with text prompts.
items.capZh: 图 4：JanusFlow 的图像生成结果。我们的模型可以生成与文本提示语义一致的高质量图像。

items.en: Impact of Decoupling Visual Encoders. e efficacy of using powerful pre-trained visual encoders in multimodal understanding. The comparison among Exp. B, C, and F demonstrates the advantages of using separate visual encoders for understanding and generation tasks. In Exp. B, following a design similar to Transfusion [103], we implement shared ConvNeXt blocks in the SDXL-VAE latent space for both understanding and generation encoders. Exp. C employs separate encoders with identical architectures and initialization parameters, but trained independently. The performance differences between these configurations validate the necessity of decoupled visual encoders in improving our unified model’s capabilities. Moreover, the superior results in Exp. C and F highlight the benefits of leveraging pre-trained semantic visual encoders for multimodal understanding tasks.
items.zh: 解耦视觉编码器的影响。使用强大的预训练视觉编码器在多模态理解中的有效性。实验 B、C 和 F 的比较表明，在理解和生成任务中使用单独的视觉编码器的优势。在实验 B 中，遵循类似于 Transfusion [103] 的设计，我们在 SDXL-VAE 潜在空间中为理解和生成编码器实现了共享的 ConvNeXt 块。实验 C 使用具有相同架构和初始化参数但独立训练的单独编码器。这些配置之间的性能差异验证了解耦视觉编码器在提高我们统一模型能力方面的必要性。此外，实验 C 和 F 中的优越结果凸显了利用预训练语义视觉编码器进行多模态理解任务的益处。

items.en: Fair Comparison with Understanding / Generation-Only Models. To establish meaningful benchmarks, we evaluate task-specific models trained under identical conditions - using the same pre-training dataset, infrastructure, and hyperparameters. Exp. D and E represent these specialized models, trained with data volumes matching the unified models in Tab. 6. The minimal performance gap between Exp. F and these task-specific baselines demonstrates that our unified framework successfully integrates understanding and generation capabilities without significant compromise in either task’s performance.
items.zh: 与仅理解/仅生成模型的公平比较。为了建立有意义的基准，我们在相同条件下评估任务专用模型——使用相同的预训练数据集、基础设施和超参数。实验 D 和 E 代表这些专用模型，使用与表 6 中统一模型匹配的数据量进行训练。实验 F 与这些任务专用基线之间的最小性能差距表明，我们的统一框架成功整合了理解和生成能力，而不会在任一任务的性能上做出显著妥协。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Visual Understanding with JanusFlow. Our model effectively handles various visual understanding tasks, such as question answering, plot interpretation and object counting.
items.capZh: 图5：JanusFlow的视觉理解能力。我们的模型有效处理各种视觉理解任务，如问答、图表解读和物体计数。

items.en: We present qualitative evaluations of our method for both image generation and understanding tasks. Fig. 1(b) and Fig. 4 showcases the image generation capabilities of JanusFlow. These results demonstrate both the high visual quality of our generated images and our framework’s ability to faithfully follow diverse instructions. For multimodal understanding, Fig. 5 presents example conversations that show our model’s understanding capabilities across various scenarios. These interactions demonstrate the model’s ability to understand and reason about visual content in natural language dialogues. Additional qualitative examples showcasing the versatility and effectiveness of JanusFlow are provided in the appendix.
items.zh: 我们展示了方法在图像生成和理解任务上的定性评估。图1(b)和图4展示了JanusFlow的图像生成能力。这些结果既体现了生成图像的高视觉质量，也展示了框架忠实遵循多样化指令的能力。对于多模态理解，图5展示了示例对话，体现了模型在各种场景下的理解能力。这些交互展示了模型在自然语言对话中理解和推理视觉内容的能力。附录中提供了更多定性示例，展示了JanusFlow的多功能性和有效性。

items.en: We present JanusFlow, a unified framework that successfully harmonizes autoregressive and rectified flow models for multimodal understanding and generation tasks. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that this unification achieves comparable performance to task-specific models. The successful integration of these fundamentally different model architectures not only addresses current challenges in multimodal learning but also opens new possibilities for future research in training unified models.
items.zh: 我们提出了JanusFlow，一个统一框架，成功协调了自回归模型和整流流模型，用于多模态理解和生成任务。我们的广泛实验表明，这种统一实现了与任务特定模型相当的性能。这些根本不同模型架构的成功整合不仅解决了当前多模态学习中的挑战，也为未来训练统一模型的研究开辟了新的可能性。
